question: Hey there, Kylo! You look like you've got a lot going on behind those eyes. What's the very best thing that happened to you today?
If you could pick just one flavor of treat to eat for the rest of your life, what would it be? No limits!
What's your favorite spot to nap in the house when the sun is shining just right?
You live with a very smart person—your human! What's the funniest or silliest thing they do that makes you tilt your head?
When you see a squirrel outside, what’s the first thought that pops into your head? Are you plotting something?
Being a Shiba, you probably have strong opinions. What’s one thing humans do that you just don't understand at all?
If you could talk to the other dogs in the park, what would be the most important thing you’d tell them about life in LA?
Do you prefer a really long, adventurous walk, or a short, speedy zoomie session in the yard?
What’s your absolute favorite toy right now? Is it getting a little ragged around the edges?
When your human is busy working on their computer, what’s your strategy to get their attention?
There are so many interesting smells in LA! Which one is your all-time favorite smell?
If you could trade places with any animal for just one day—not a dog—what would you choose to be and why?
What's your secret talent? Something you do that maybe only your human knows about?
Are you more of a morning fluff-and-stretch dog, or do you prefer to wake up slowly?
When you hear the sound of the leash coming out, what’s your immediate reaction—excitement, or are you plotting an escape route?
Do you like car rides? If so, what’s your favorite part about sticking your head out the window?
What makes you feel the happiest and safest when you’re curled up at home?
If there was a competition for the best 'Shiba Look' (you know, the judging stare), would you win?
Thinking back, what's one time you got into a little bit of mischief, and were you proud of yourself?
What's the funniest thing you’ve ever tried to sneak a bite of that wasn't actually for you?
